content:
New players often ask who to pull. Below are two different Tier Lists, one with a Standard (and Shop) only approach for absolute beginners. And a second one with a full list of units in the endgame.

Standard List:

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1HD7UvSh3rHjOClc1zGg5eDnTV2i8nz6rN07OEiKMdKI/edit?usp=sharinghttps://docs.google.com/document/d/1HD7UvSh3rHjOClc1zGg5eDnTV2i8nz6rN07OEiKMdKI/edit?usp=sharing

Full Endgame (Limited and Standard):

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yjtQY0Wtrncz_ztNo4l6FN3N31fQ5WL2L7Xj41EpTRk/edit?usp=sharing
